title: Nature Parks and Other Similar Institutions

labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 712190 ($586,634,813) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 712190 ($1,142,626,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.1664 (margins.json[71]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Recreation EBITDA/Sales 16.64%); revenue/employee $139,719 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 712190); class <5: 320 firms, avg revenue/firm $339,494 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $56,492 -> out of $1-10M band; class 5-9: 123 firms, avg revenue/firm $835,642 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $139,051 -> out of $1-10M band; class 10-19: 98 firms, avg revenue/firm $1,823,612 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $303,449 -> out of $1-10M band; class 20-99: 90 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,798,078 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $632,000 -> out of $1-10M band; class 100-499: 14 firms, avg revenue/firm $22,651,714 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,769,245 -> IN $1-10M band; class 500+: 4 firms, avg revenue/firm $23,384,750 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,891,222 -> IN $1-10M band; n_band = 18
